description: Legal record (#28) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on ff. 10v-11r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated Iyyar [5322] AM (1562 CE), based on the year mentioned in the first entry on the same folio. ʿAbd al-Laṭīf b. Moshe al-Maghribī takes an oath that he will cease quarreling with anyone in the Karaite community for 10 months. A communal fine of a gold ashrafī is mentioned if he violates his oath. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
